changes.summary: Added PublishSourceEntityToBirzhaParams shared type for PublicationService delegation. PublishProjectToBirzhaUseCase and executeBirzhaSourcePublish unchanged: inv-07 isUserAdmin gate before side effects; inv-08 validation and CommunityWallet postCost debit before persistence.
No logic changes; community path consumed via PublicationService thin wrapper alongside project use case.

PublicationService.publishSourceEntityToBirzha delegates to PublishProjectToBirzhaUseCase or PublishCommunityToBirzhaUseCase (mirrors CreatePublicationUseCase wiring). Removed ~220 lines of duplicate inline orchestration. project.publishToBirzha and communities.publishToBirzha now reach use cases through the service.

notes: Delegation wired via PublicationService thin wrapper (same interim pattern as p4-create-publication-uc) because DAG write_set omits routers; tRPC handlers still call ctx.publicationService.publishSourceEntityToBirzha which now routes to the extracted use cases. project.router retains transport-level isUserAdmin pre-check; use case enforces inv-07 again before debit.
